title: Ann Patricio
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Ann Patricio''' provided the voice of [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]] and [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] in the [[Dark Empire: The Collector's Edition|''Dark Empire'' audio dramatizations]].<ref name="Dark Empire">[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire '' audio drama]]</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}

|-
|[[1995]]||[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'']]||Princess Leia, Mon Mothma<ref name="Dark Empire II">[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]</ref>
|-
|1995||[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'']]||Princess Leia<ref name="Empire's End">[[Empire's End (audio drama)|''Empire's End'' audio drama]]</ref>
|}
